## Summary

Describe the change in terms of behavior and intent.

## Scope

- What changed
- What did not change
- Any follow-up work intentionally left out

## Verification

- Commands run:
- Manual checks:
- Screenshots or API examples:

## Risk

- User-facing risk:
- Operational or data risk:
- Rollback path:

## Checklist

- [ ] The branch is scoped to one concern
- [ ] Commit messages are meaningful from the history alone
- [ ] Tests or equivalent verification were run, or the gap is called out
- [ ] Docs were updated if workflow, behavior, or screenshots changed
- [ ] Risky logic changes are called out explicitly
